description:
The InteractiveCameraAnchor component acts as a spot to drop or auto transition a streaming or other type of camera or to.

See Camera Anchors.

fields.OverrideRoot: The place other than under this component's slot to parent the cameta.
fields.FieldOfView: What the FOV of a camera anchored to this anchor should be set to.
fields.Highlighted: Whether this anchor is being highlighted as part of specifying a camera anchor set/route.
fields.InUse: Whether or not the anchor has a camera in it.

usage: Attaching this component to a slot creates the visual as well as the default values. Simply dropping a stream camera into the visual will snap the camera to it.
